title: Mobile exercise layout — card view with no horizontal scrolling
feedback: On mobile web, having to scroll left to right to add weights and reps was not intuitive.

title: What's New banner now live-updates from a single file
feedback: Release notes were stale and out of sync with actual features shipped.

title: Progressive Overload Signal — per-exercise weight comparison
feedback: Users wanted to know at a glance whether they were progressing on each lift.

title: Muscle Balance Ratio — Push:Pull and Quad:Hamstring over 28 days
feedback: Serious lifters wanted a structural view of their volume balance, not just totals.

title: Feedback now routes via Web3Forms — direct email reply to users
feedback: Previous feedback mechanism had no reliable notification path to the team.

title: Smoother rest timer audio — gentle start, explosive final 10 seconds
feedback: The start beep was reported as jarring and disruptive at the beginning of rest.

title: Rest timer pause button
feedback: Mid-rest interruptions had no recovery path — the timer would reset instead of holding.
